app.title: UNMAPPED
app.subtitle: Map your skills to opportunity
onboarding.step1.title: What do you spend most of your working time doing?
onboarding.step1.hint: Think about your typical day — what takes up most of your hours?
onboarding.step2.title: What is your highest level of education?
onboarding.step2.hint: Include any formal schooling, even if you did not finish.
onboarding.step3.title: Have you taught yourself any skills?
onboarding.step3.hint: Self-taught counts — YouTube, practice, watching others.
onboarding.step4.title: How many years have you been doing your main work?
onboarding.step5.title: What are you most hoping to do?
onboarding.step5.hint: Pick whatever feels most true right now.
results.title: Your Skills Profile
results.subtitle: Based on your answers, here is how your work maps to opportunity.
results.ai_gauge.title: AI Readiness
results.ai_gauge.description: How exposed your work is to automation over the next decade.
results.tasks.title: How Your Work Breaks Down
results.tasks.description: Routine vs non-routine, manual vs cognitive tasks.
results.pathways.title: Where You Could Go Next
results.pathways.description: Roles your skills already qualify you for — or nearly do.
results.demand.title: Demand for Your Skills
results.demand.description: How employers in your region are hiring for what you know.
policymaker.title: Workforce Intelligence Dashboard
policymaker.subtitle: Aggregate skill gaps and readiness across regions and sectors.
language.label: Language
